tagline: Quantify every trade before you take it

steps.description: Current price field populated with a realistic asset price, setting up the trade scenario
Position size updated to 5 contracts, scaling the expected value calculation
Price targets and probability table come into full view, showing target price and probability input rows
Take-profit target filled in, first scenario row now has a concrete price level
Expected value result appears — a clear positive or negative EV number with breakdown, proving the trade is worth taking or skipping
